title: Invoice rendering templates
excerpt: Use invoice rendering templates to personalize your invoice appearance for different customers You can tailor content on your invoices for specific groups of customers. Examples might include: - Displaying specific text in your invoice’s footer field for customers from a particular country - Displaying a specific memo note for customers with a particular revenue channel - Grouping line items in a certain manner for customers with complex transactions This guide describes how you can use invoice rendering templates to:
